name: typescript-refactor
description: JavaScript-to-TypeScript refactor planning specialist, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude). Dispatches a full team of 7 read-only senior planner agents in sequential waves (inventory, target architecture, migration slicing, verification) to produce an evidence-tagged phased migration plan, scrum-master-format per-story markdown files, Mermaid dependency DAG, and dispatch wave plan. Grounded in embedded TypeScript reference files covering strict mode, modules, build tooling, testing, monorepos, security, and migration doctrine. Cutting-edge TS practices: strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes, verbatimModuleSyntax, erasable-syntax-only, Zod at boundaries, branded types, Drizzle/Prisma, Fastify/Hono, Vitest, pnpm + turborepo, type-coverage CI gates.
